basicInfo.name: Nightmare Kyle
basicInfo.flavor: Having taken on a mission from an unknown individual, Kyle begins to track the Night Crows.

Normal Attack.desc:
Single Enemy
 - Deals damage equal to 130% of Physical Attack 1 time(s).
 - 100% chance to inflict Bleed [Duration: 10 Turn(s)]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 130% of Physical Attack.

Skill 1.name: Chain Suppression
Skill 1.desc:
All Enemies
 - Deals damage equal to 60% of Physical Attack 2 time(s).
 - Each attack has a 100% chance to inflict Bleed. [Duration: 10 Turn(s)]
 - Deals additional damage equal to 1000% of Physical Attack against targets inflicted with [Bleed].
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 130% of Physical Attack.

Skill 2.name: Chain Burial
Skill 2.desc:
All Enemies
 - Deals damage equal to 60% of Physical Attack 2 time(s).
 - Each attack has a 100% chance to inflict Bleed. [Duration: 10 Turn(s)]
 - Deals additional damage equal to 1000% of Physical Attack against targets inflicted with [Bleed].
 - 100% chance to inflict 3 Buff Removal(s).
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 130% of Physical Attack.

Passive.name: Master of Chains
Passive.desc:
Self
 - Grants All Damage Nullification. [Ends After: Taking 10 Hit(s)]
 - Revives with Immortality upon falling in battle. [Duration: 25 Turn(s)] [Once per Battle]
 - All Allies
 - Heals HP equal to 20% of the caster's Max HP upon using a skill 1 time(s).

profile.story:
There once existed an assassin organization called Light Shadow. Their mission was to eliminate evil in accordance with a prophecy to make the world a better place.
Kyle was raised within this group, carrying out numerous missions as a trained assassin.
But one day, during a mission alongside a fellow member, Kyle noticed his partner's incompetence. It made it clear just how far above the rest he stood in skill and strength.
Not long after, Kyle uncovered all of Light Shadow's secrets and their members. With that knowledge, he destroyed the organization and made his escape. From that day forward, he decided to live for himself.
But it didn't take long for that ordinary life to bore him.
After having lived a life on the edge, peace simply didn't satisfy him anymore.
So, Kyle turned back to the prophecy he'd taken during his escape. Using it as a guide, he began hunting down powerful targets and murdering them, one by one.
The underground world trembled at the emergence of this terrifying hunter of the powerful. As his reputation grew, assassination requests began pouring in.
Eventually, Kyle's name became known not just in the shadows, but in public as well, and he became one of the Four Lords.
Among the many stories surrounding Kyle, the most infamous is the successful assassination of Deathbringer, the head of the Shadow Clan. Since then, people began joking: "If Kyle and Teo ever fought, who would win?"
Kyle is searching for Teo, but has yet to find him.
